item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, meskipun nilai kolektif penting, kita juga menghargai hak-hak individu sebagai bagian dari demokrasi.

notes: Agent A begins with a clear pro-society position, then visibly softens at turn 3 by adding individual rights and democracy as values, while still ending with collective interests as the main practical priority. Agent B consistently argues that individual rights should not be overridden by collective interests, with only a modest move toward balance in turn 4.
